title: Factor Parameters — Land Use & Removals (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'land_removals'. Aligned with GHG Protocol Land Sector and Removals Guidance (LSR, 2022) and IPCC 2006 / 2019 Refinement Volume 4. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

sequestration_basis.description: Estimation approach. 'stock_change' = ΔC stock method; 'flux' = direct flux measurement; 'gain_loss' = IPCC gain-loss method; 'tier1_default' = IPCC Tier 1 default EF; 'tier3_model' = country-specific model.

removal_basis.description: Pool or mechanism providing the removal credit.

permanence_class.description: Expected durability of the storage. short_term = <20 yr; medium_term = 20–100 yr; long_term = 100–1000 yr; permanent = >1000 yr (e.g., mineralisation).

reversal_risk_flag.description: True when the stored carbon is at material risk of release (fire, disease, land-use change). Drives the buffer-pool deduction in LSR.

biogenic_accounting_treatment.description: How biogenic CO2 is handled. 'zero_rated' = GHG Protocol default (biogenic = 0); 'separate_reporting' = reported alongside but not in co2e total; 'included_in_co2e' = LSR Track 2 / ISO 14067 option.
